value.//: Central configuration. Change anything here BEFORE running deploy. Every name, region, SKU, and model is configurable.
value.//region: primaryLocation hosts Cosmos DB, AI Search, Container Apps, and Application Insights. Foundry can run in different regions via aiFoundry.locations to chase model quota.
value.//features: Turn whole resource groups of services on/off. The workshop needs all five set to true.

aiFoundry.//locations: Foundry runs in these regions. FIRST = primary (feeds the workshop .env). SECOND = secondary full stack for model-quota overflow / fallback. All OTHER resources stay in primaryLocation. Use one region by leaving a single entry. NOTE: every model in deployments[] must be available in EVERY region listed here.
aiFoundry.//chatDeploymentName: Must match one deployment.name below; written to .env as AZURE_AI_MODEL_DEPLOYMENT.
aiFoundry.//embeddingDeploymentName: Must match one deployment.name below; written to .env as AZURE_AI_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT (long-term memory).

deployments.name: gpt-4.1-mini
deployments.//capacity: Capacity is in thousands of TPM; 2000 = 2 million TPM.

deployments.name: gpt-5.4-mini
deployments.//capacity: Capacity is in thousands of TPM; 2000 = 2 million TPM.

cosmosDb.//containers: Names must match the workshop .env (COSMOS_*_CONTAINER). Partition key is /id for all three.

value.//dataPlatform: Day 2 - Data Platform components for Lakehouse, Vector Search, and Azure ML labs

dataPlatform.//Note: Set adminObjectId to the Entra Object ID of the workshop organizer/admin
